title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Astral Pipes - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Astral Pipes - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
